stemHtml: Assuming other factors remain constant and not limiting, increasing the aerodrome pressure altitude…

options.a: will cause the maximum permitted take-off mass to decrease.
options.b: has no effect on the maximum permitted take-of mass up to 5000 ft pressure altitude above which it increases.
options.c: will cause the maximum permitted take-off mass to increase.
options.d: has no effect on the maximum permitted take-off mass.
